name: Trigger | Cooldown
description:
“It’s pretty hot today..but at least it gives us a good sweat. Also why are you so quiet? Did something happen?”

Double bot upload!

This one is a reward for my moderator in my discord server Ktu.

They helped me a lot in making my server so I wanted to give them this bot as a thank you!

I’ll be coming out with a new bot I haven’t made yet very soon, maybe even today! I just wanted to make this bot cause it’s a reward, but also cause I needed to make a summer bot lol

Anyways I hope you guys join the server! And if you do I’ll be happy to see you there!

Enjoy the bot! And I’ll see you guys on the next one! Bye bye! 💛🖤💛

Artist: Skymole_01
creator: Capt
